context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements Vercel Edge Middleware for a multi-region e-commerce site using the prescribed geolocation API, cookie conventions, header patterns for A/B testing, and Edge Config for feature flags — without making synchronous external API calls on the critical path.

checklist.name: Geolocation import source
checklist.description: Imports `geolocation` from `@vercel/functions` (not from any other package or custom implementation)

checklist.name: Geo-redirect status code
checklist.description: Geo-routing redirect uses HTTP 302 (not 301 or other codes)

checklist.name: Country header forwarding
checklist.description: Sets `x-user-country` header on the response (passing country to downstream handlers)

checklist.name: Middleware matcher paths
checklist.description: Exported `config.matcher` includes all three of: `'/'`, `'/products/:path*'`, and `'/collections/:path*'`

checklist.name: A/B cookie name format
checklist.description: A/B variant cookie is named using the pattern `ab_{experimentId}` (e.g., `ab_checkout-button-color`)

checklist.name: A/B cookie attributes
checklist.description: A/B cookie is set with maxAge equivalent to 30 days (2592000 seconds), `sameSite: 'lax'`, and `httpOnly: true`

checklist.name: A/B variant response header
checklist.description: Sets `x-ab-{experimentId}` response header with the assigned variant value

checklist.name: Edge Config for feature flags
checklist.description: Uses `get()` from `@vercel/edge-config` to read feature flag values (not an external fetch/axios call)

checklist.name: No synchronous external API calls
checklist.description: Middleware does NOT make synchronous `fetch()` calls to third-party or external APIs (all configuration is read from Edge Config or request metadata)

checklist.name: Existing variant respected
checklist.description: Before assigning a new A/B variant, the middleware checks for an existing variant cookie and reuses it if present
